address.notes: Heaviest body section (stroke_rel med 1.122, p75 1.254) but below bold threshold; consider a mild ~1.10 weight nudge if address lines look thin. n=776.

barcode_caption.notes: Distinctly smaller (cap_rel med 0.844) and lighter (stroke_rel med 0.733) than body; long numeric strings under the barcode. n=219.

other.notes: Median is body-weight; elevated p75 (stroke 1.267, cap 1.158) comes from SPROUTS logo/header lines mixed into this bucket, not a section-wide style. n=2137.

payment.notes: Slightly condensed print (cap_rel med 0.921, stroke 0.958); card/auth block. n=1917. RENDERER NOTE: measured cap_rel 0.921 but per-receipt OCR sizing already absorbs most of the condensation; applying the full 0.90 double-counts and drifted right-aligned payment segments 25px on the review receipt (blocker). 0.95 keeps the visual cue without the drift.

section_header.notes: Category headers (DAIRY, GROCERY, BAKERY). Underlined on ~41% of lines - the only meaningful underline signal on the receipt. Slightly taller than body (cap 1.071); stroke normal (1.012). n=287.

separator.notes: Asterisk rules; cap_rel undefined (no cap-height letters). Stroke normal (1.017). n=171.

store_hours.notes: Body-weight (cap 1.0, stroke 1.081, mildly heavy but within band). n=237.

summary.notes: Slightly smaller than body (cap_rel med 0.947); BALANCE DUE / CHANGE / tax lines. n=577. NOTE: BALANCE DUE lines are excluded — see 'balance_due' (bold).

total_line.notes: Total: USD$ lines print marginally taller (cap 1.053) but NOT bold (stroke 0.998) - do not embolden. n=114.

balance_due.notes: Split from 'summary' after adversarial verification REFUTED the bucket median: BALANCE DUE prints visibly bolder and taller on held-out scans (stroke 4.0px vs body 3.0px = +33%, height 44-45px vs 40-41px = +10%). The summary bucket's n=577 median was diluted by CHANGE/TAX/CREDIT lines. Verified on 03fa2d0f#1 and d5f79185#1.

/.evidence: stroke_rel_med -21% (item, n=65), -18% (other, n=1829), -26% (footer, n=158) vs section typical; pure diagonal renders weak, matches known diagonal-glyph weakness.

i.evidence: stroke_rel_med -18% (other, n=6753), -19% (footer, n=9199); single thin vertical.

l.evidence: stroke_rel_med -17% (other, n=4812), -17% (footer, n=3073); single thin vertical.

:.evidence: stroke_rel_med -16% (other, n=1133), -15% (survey, n=1344); dot pair measures light.

2.evidence: stroke_rel_med +24% (item, n=433), +23% (other, n=4330), +24% (footer, n=1252); most consistent heavy glyph in the fleet.

F.evidence: stroke_rel_med +17% (item, n=364), +26% (other, n=1475), +27% (footer, n=48), +17% (survey, n=181); heavy in all four body sections.

verdicts.section_header_underline: CONFIRMED (3/3 headers underlined on held-out scans; 0.415 may undercount)
verdicts.storefront_size: CONFIRMED (address/hours = body size; only logo is larger)
